author: doll-agent
content:
Change MaskedArray::data_mut signature from -> &mut Array<T, D> to -> Option<&mut [T]>. Returning the full mutable Array let callers reshape/resize, breaking the (data shape == mask shape) invariant. The slice form permits in-place element updates only. Returns None for non-contiguous layouts where a flat slice can't be exposed.

No real callers exist (verified via grep), so the change is non-breaking in practice.
